steps_raw.instruction: Load samples onto 4–12% SDS-PAGE gels (Invitrogen, Cat# NP0321BOX or NP0323BOX).
Include PageRuler Prestained protein marker (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 26620 or 26617) for size reference.
Run the gel according to standard electrophoresis protocols.
Transfer proteins onto nitrocellulose membranes (GE Healthcare, Cat# RPN132D) for 01:30:00 using the Mini Trans-Blot Cell (Bio-Rad, Cat# 20-45-111).
Block membranes for 01:00:00 at Room temperature with 5% milk powder in TBS-T.
Incubate membranes Overnight at 4 °C with primary antibodies diluted in blocking buffer.
Wash membranes three times for 00:05:00 each with TBS-T.
Incubate with HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies diluted 1:10,000 in blocking buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Wash membranes three times with TBS-T.
Incubate membranes with SuperSignal West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 34096).
Image blots using ChemiDoc MP Imaging System (Bio-Rad).
Analyze the images using ImageJ (RRID:SCR_003070; https://imagej.net/).
